dialogos.texto_en: (After that, we tried going around various places\n in American Village,\n but we couldn't find any souvenirs.)
(Although it wasn't a replacement, we enjoyed\n the sunset from the Ferris Wheel and had dinner\n at a restaurant before heading back to the hotel.)
Whew, we're back.
Good work today.
Since we've had dinner,\nall we have to do now is sleep.\nIs it okay to split up like this?
Ah, wait.
What is it?
U-um...
Yeah, yeah, we get it.
Fu-kun, there's something urgent.\nWe have to change room assignments starting today.
Wha?\nWhen did that happen...?
Oh, could it be that Ichika messed up the room so much\nthat you couldn't handle it, Nino?
I didn't!
Well, some things happened,\nso now Ichika, Uesugi-kun, and Raiha-chan\nwill be in the same room from now on.
%p-2;――%p; Whaa?
I'll be with Nino, Itsuki and Yotsuba\nwill have their own rooms. That's what we decided.
WHAAAAA?!
So, I'm looking forward to rooming with you two,\nFutaro-kun, Raiha-chan.
Woah, woah, woah, woah!\nWhy did it have to be like that?!
W-well, you see!\nI'm really bad at sleeping,\nso I'd be a bother to Raiha-chan.
Yeah, right.
You're sleeping in the bed right next to hers.\nHow could you bother her with your sleeping position?
Well, it's really bad. I do acrobatics in my sleep!
That's impossible!
Anyway, it's been decided, so let's make the best of it.
It was the result of a strict discussion.
(Whaaaa... What's with this development...)
(As for me, well, it's not a bad thing that I'll be\n spending more time with Ichika.\n It means more chances to kiss her...)
(No, wait!\n Wouldn't sharing a room lead to various problems?!)
Uesugi-kun? What are you thinking about?
N-nothing, nothing at all?!
Hmm? \nWere you picturing all sorts of things, Futaro-kun? \nAre you worried about being with the big sister?
H-hey, you know what they say,\nto separate boys and girls at the age of seven!
At age seven? What?\nNino, did you know that?
No idea?
I didn't know either.
Did you know, Itsuki?
Um, no, not really.
(These guys...!\n They never change when it comes to this kind of stuff!)
Anyway, the room assignments have been decided.\nYou don't mind, do you, Fu-kun?
Well, I don't mind, but...
That kind of thing...\nit's bad for Raiha's upbringing, isn't it?!
Big brooo? Don't talk to people\nlike they're little kids. I'm already\na second-year middle school student, ya know.
Uuuh...
Or rather, Fu-kun, you weren't planning on doing \nanything bad to damage that upbringing?
Uuggh...
Based on what I've seen so far,\nit's actually you who's had the poor upbringing.
I agree.
Nnngghh...
Anyway, the room assignments have been decided.\nYou don't mind, do you, Fu-kun?
Well, I don't mind, but...
Stop that kind of talk.
Eh? What do you mean?
I'm saying...\nthat there are times when it's not a joke.
...I'm sorry.\nI didn't realize you thought that way about me.
Well, it's okay because it's me.
You're treating me like I'm something precious.
Of course you are...
Hey, what are we looking at right now?
Affection...
Anyway, the room assignments have been decided.\nYou don't mind, do you, Fu-kun?
Well, I don't mind, but...
Alright then, it's settled.
*sigh*\nOkay, if Ichika wants it that way, I don't mind.
Thank you, Futaro-kun!\nAs soon as we get back, I'll move to your room!
Um, Itsuki-san, do you think I'd be a bother\nat times like this?
W-well... I'm not sure, you know?
It's no bother at all!\nAnd it won't be weird at all!
Even though you say that, big bro,\nmaybe you actually prefer being alone\nwith Ichika-san%p-2;――
SHUUUT IIIT!
Ahaha...\nRaiha-chan sure is mature.
